raw_consumer_statement: Myself and my friend shopped at the restaurant supply store on XX/XX/year>, we were both then victims of fraud from XXXX XXXX XXXX  for a {$40.00} charge at the same time on our credit cards. Neither of us have ever been to the place and it is known for fraud. I called XXXX XXXX, Barclays and they said that they would look into it. I then got a letter a month later stating I made the charge myself since the card was in my possession and the charge went back to my account. I called back and XXXX said theres nothing they can do about it.
